texto: Being an idealist is not being a simpleton
autor: without idealists there would be no optimism and without optimism there would be no courage to achieve advances that so-called realists would have you believe could never come to fruition.
explicacao: Citação de without idealists there would be no optimism and without optimism there would be no courage to achieve advances that so-called realists would have you believe could never come to fruition. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Being an idealist is not being a simpleton” articula reflexao, alisa-steinberg, being em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
